articles.title: About this site
articles.contents:
Myself
I am a studies engineer working on the effects of various stressors (chemicals, temperature, etc.) on aquatic animals. I am also a huge fan of coding, particularly with RStudio.
Cyclism
I have been practicing cycling at a high level since my childhood (Direct Vélo) and I am extremely knowledgeable about the subject. Interesting fact: I am one of the few people who can keep from falling asleep during an entire stage of the Tour de France.

Costa Rica
I had the opportunity to live in Costa Rica for ~1 year. I was able to discover many of nature’s wonders, particularly during my first backpacking trip.

articles.title: Curriculum vitae
articles.contents:
- Research Interests
Multiple stressors & fish
- Publications
Work in progress…
- Skills
Ecology : fish, estuary, rivers, catchments, spawning grounds
Anthopogenic : heatwaves, chemicals
Ecotoxicology : PAF method
Modelisation : time series, linear model
Coding : R (RStudio), SQL (DBeaver), Markdown (Quarto), Git (Github)
Base Microsoft : Word, Excel, Powerpoint
- Research jobs
INRAE Centre Nouvelle-Aquitaine
Cestas-Gazinet (Bordeaux, France) - December 2023 to July 2024
Studying the effects of estuarine heatwaves in fish communities
Writing an article
INRAE Centre Nouvelle-Aquitaine
Cestas-Gazinet (Bordeaux, France) - September 2023 to November 2023
Writing an article : “Assessing the impact of chemical pollution on endangered migratory fish within a catchment using a Potentially Affected Fraction of species (PAF) approach: a case study at main rivers and spawning ground scales”
- Educational background
Master of “Environmental Sciences” (SPE) in “Environmental Management and Coastal Ecology” (GEEL)
La Rochelle University (2021-2023)
Data Analysis, Geographical Information System, Biogeochemical Cycles, Ichtyology, Coastal Sampling, Oceanography, Impacts of Human Activities, etc.
Protocol for sampling, sorting, selection of biological samples and data analysis in the Baie de l’Aiguillon mudflat
Master of “Integrated Management of Tropical Coastal Areas” (GIACT)
University of Costa Rica (2022-2023)
Courses taught entirely in Spanish
Ecological Economics, Oceanography, Politics, Governance, Integrated Tropical Coastal Management, Fisheries Management, etc.
Protocol for sampling water characteristics in estuaries with different anthropogenic impacts
License of Organismal and Population Biology (BOP)
Angers University (2018-2021)
Genetics, Ecotoxicology, Zoology, Ethology, Physiology, Microbiology, Anatomy, Population Dynamics, etc.
Scientific Baccalaureate in Life and Earth Sciences – 2018 (sports-study programme)
Saint Thomas D’Aquin high school
High-level athlete: organization, autonomy and rigor
- Industry Experience
Material handler - Temporary (2019)
Les Fromageries Perreault
Corporate teamwork
- Volunteer
4P SCIENSEAS (2022)
Photo Project – Route du Plastique
Bibliographical work to raise public awareness of the problem of plastic pollution
Recreational activities to raise public awareness of the problem of plastic pollution
- Sports Awards
Cyclism (National level)
VC Lucéen (2020-2022) - National level
Angers Cyclisme (2018-2019) - National level
UC Nantes Atlantique (2017) - National level
Basket-ball (Regional level)cing cycling at a high level since my childhood (Direct Vélo) and I am extremely knowledgeable about the subject. Interesting fact: I am one of the few people who can keep from falling asleep during an entire stage of the Tour de France.
